page: Amazon Web Services r6id.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores based on the x86_64 Intel Xeon 8375C processor running at 3.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. It also includes 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 19 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates solid performance across memory and compute tasks. It achieves a stress-ng multi-core CPU performance score of 46468.49 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 15766.0. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only small block cached speeds of 2489.98 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds of 70.15 GB/sec. The hardware shows strong capabilities in cryptographic operations, scoring 43337.66 in the Passmark CPU encryption test, and image processing with a Geekbench score of 15276.0.

The inclusion of local NVMe SSD storage makes this instance highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring high-speed, low-latency local data access without the added cost of external block storage. The dedicated CPU allocation and 54 MB L3 cache support consistent execution. This profile is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, including large-scale databases, real-time analytics, caching layers like Redis, and memory-bound enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r6id.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8375C processor running at 3.5 GHz. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it delivers 384.0 GB of DDR4 memory alongside 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and 19 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results show a stress-ng multi-core score of 46468.49 and a Passmark CPU encryption score of 43337.66, indicating strong cryptographic performance. The instance is highly efficient for workloads requiring a balance of large memory capacity and fast local storage, such as high-performance databases, in-memory caches, and data-intensive enterprise applications.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance combining dedicated Intel Xeon processors with high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage for demanding database workloads.

384.0 GB of high-speed DDR4 memory for memory-intensive applications
2850 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage for low-latency data access
